task_completion.description: Verify the 'Sample Order Lines' dataset is loaded into Oracle Analytics Desktop.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Data Elements panel on the left side of the Oracle Analytics Desktop interface displays columns from the dataset, such as 'Quantity Ordered' and 'Sales'.

task_completion.description: Verify a custom bin grouping named 'Order Size Cluster' has been created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A new data element named 'Order Size Cluster' is visible in the Data Elements panel or actively placed in the Grammar panel.

task_completion.description: Verify the custom bin uses the correct categories: 'Small', 'Medium', and 'Bulk'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The chart's axis, legend, data labels, or the bin configuration dialog explicitly displays the labels 'Small', 'Medium', and 'Bulk'.

task_completion.description: Verify the visualization is either a Bar Chart or a Donut Chart.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The main canvas displays a Bar Chart (horizontal or vertical) or a Donut Chart. The visualization type icon in the top-left of the Grammar panel should match.

task_completion.description: Verify the chart visualizes 'Sales' (representing Revenue) by the new 'Order Size Cluster'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Grammar panel shows 'Order Size Cluster' assigned to a category/color role and 'Sales' assigned to a value/size/y-axis role. The chart itself reflects these dimensions and measures.

task_completion.description: Verify the workbook is saved with the correct name.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The top title bar of the Oracle Analytics Desktop window displays 'Order_Size_Analysis', or a file explorer window shows 'Order_Size_Analysis.dva' in the C:\Users\Docker\Documents directory.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Oracle Analytics Desktop GUI to perform the analysis.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with Oracle Analytics Desktop menus, drag-and-drop actions, and dialog boxes, rather than terminal commands or Python scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the chart is rendered natively within Oracle Analytics Desktop.
integrity.visual_evidence: The chart is located inside the Oracle Analytics workspace canvas with its standard UI surrounding it, not in a standalone image viewer, paint program, or web browser.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not mock the visualization or labels using text boxes or drawing tools.
integrity.visual_evidence: The chart elements, axes, and legends are genuine Oracle Analytics UI components generated from the data, without overlaid text boxes or manually drawn shapes.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected output file is 'Order_Size_Analysis.dva' saved at 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\Order_Size_Analysis.dva'. The custom bin grouping must have the exact labels: 'Small', 'Medium', and 'Bulk'. Note: The task instruction mentions 'Quantity' and 'Revenue', but the actual dataset contains 'Quantity Ordered' and 'Sales'. The agent should correctly map these and use 'Quantity Ordered' for the bins and 'Sales' for the visualization.
